meaning: n.细查,讨论,劝诱vt.彻底检查,细究,向...拉票或拉生意,讨论vi.游说,拉选票
examples: Firefox 3 also now supports transformation functions for the canvass objects.
Firefox 3 extends the canvass element beyond the official WHATWG specification.
The company directed me to travel into the wilderness by boat to canvass the resident natives.
Good individual plans are hard to find, so make sure to canvass the entire landscape.
This year's canvass has yielded a smaller shift in vote totals than any of them.
